## Documentation Issue
What is the issue with the documentation?

## Location
Where is the issue located?
- File: [path to file]
- Section: [if applicable]
- URL: [if online]

## Problem Description
Describe the problem with the documentation.

## Suggested Improvement
If you have a suggestion for how to improve the documentation, describe it here.

## Type of Issue
- [ ] Missing information
- [ ] Outdated information
- [ ] Unclear description
- [ ] Incorrect information
- [ ] Broken link
- [ ] Other

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the issue.
